    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AddController
     
    AppConfig
    Class that manages the storage and retrieval of application configurations.
    AppConfig
     
    AppConfig
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    AppConfig.ConfigKey
    A set of configurations that can be used in IPOS-CA.
    AppConfigAPI
    Class that translates between primitive types (mainly ints and strings) and byte arrays.
    AppConfigRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    ASController
     
    AuthenticationException
    An exception class for authentication-related errors such as invalid credentials, existence of user or role changes.
    Bootstrap
    Class that handles the initialisation of the application.
    BootstrapException
    Exception class for bootstrap errors.

    Customer
    Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer handling.
    Customer
     
    Customer
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    Customer.CustomerPath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    CustomerCharge
    Class that records charges made on customer membership credits.
    CustomerCharge
     
    CustomerCharge
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerCharge.CustomerChargePath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    CustomerChargeRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerDebt
    Class that contains the comprehensive business logic for customer debt handling.
    CustomerDebt
     
    CustomerDebt
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerDebt.CustomerDebtPath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    CustomerDebtRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerEnums
    A collection of enums that represent a defined set of data relating to a customer.
    CustomerEnums.AccountStatus
    Three possible statuses for a customer's account that can dictate their ability to make payments.
    CustomerEnums.CardType
    The three main card vendors, but also includes "Other" to cover any other vendor.
    CustomerEnums.DiscountPlan
    The two possible discount plans a customer can choose from.
    CustomerEnums.PaymentMethod
    The three payment methods a customer can use to complete a transaction.
    CustomerEnums.ReminderStatus
    The three possible statuses for a customer's reminder.
    CustomerEnums.ReminderType
    Reminders get sent twice per month, this enum represents the two types of reminders.
    CustomerMonthlyBalance
     
    CustomerMonthlyBalance
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerMonthlyBalance.CustomerMonthlyBalancePath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    CustomerMonthlyBalanceRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerMonthlySpend
    Class that records monthly spend of customers and uses that data to also calculate whether a rate change is needed.
    CustomerMonthlySpend
     
    CustomerMonthlySpend
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerMonthlySpend.CustomerMonthlySpendPath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    CustomerMonthlySpend.FlexiRateChange
    This record stores the need for a rate change and the new rate and is returned by CustomerMonthlySpend.warrantsRateChange(int id) and used by SaleService to adjust flexi rates accordingly.
    CustomerMonthlySpendRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerPayment
    Class that records customer payments and absolves debt status to applicable customers.
    CustomerRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    CustomerReminder
    Class that records reminders sent to customers.

    This class is generated by jOOQ.

    Record that stores the customer ID and balance of a debt that requires a state change.

    ReminderFactory
    A factory class that generates PDF reminders for customer debt using JasperReports.
    ReminderInfo
    A java bean to hold the required reminder data for reminder PDF generation by JasperReports
    ReminderInfo.Merchant
    A record used by all Jasper-facing factory or java bean classes to store merchant information.
    RepaymentController
     
    ReportFactory
    Centralised factory class for generating reports for the RPT package using JasperReports.
    ReportService
    Utility class that organises data required for generating reports.

    Sale
     
    Sale
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    Sale.SalePath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    SaleItem
     
    SaleItem
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    SaleItem.SaleItemPath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    SaleItemRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    SaleLine
    Java bean that represents a line in a cart.
    SaleRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    SaleService
     
    SaleService.Callback
    This record is a data class that contains the session data for a sale.
    SaleService.CartMode
    An enum representing the mode of the cart (member or guest).
    SaleService.Sale
    This record is a data class that represents a sale.
    SaleService.SaleDraft
    This record is a data class that represents a draft of a sale.
    SaleService.SaleItem
    This record is a data class that represents an item in a sale.
    SelectController
     
    SelectController.Totals
    A record that stores the 3 different totals: Cart Sum, Total with VAT and Total with Discounts.
    Server
    Class that handles the HTTP server that will host IPOS-CA's provided interfaces, powered by Javalin
    Session
    Class that stores the current user's session.
    SessionManager
    Class that holds the current session in memory throughout the lifetime of the application.
    SessionTimeoutManager
    Class for managing session timeout.
    SplashController
     
    SQLiteConnection
     
    StatementController
     
    StatementFactory
    A factory class that generates PDF monthly statements for customer debt using JasperReports.
    StatementItems
    A java bean to hold the required statement data.
    StatementService
    A utility class that handles and organises data required for generating monthly statements.
    StatementService.StatementInfo
    A record class that holds the required data for generating a monthly statement.
    Stock
    A comprehensive class that manages the storage, retrieval and management of stock information.
    Stock
     
    Stock
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
    Stock.PUStockRequest
    This record contains the data required to make a PU request to take stock from CA.
    Stock.SAStockRequest
    This record contains the data required to make a SA request to add/update stock in CA.
    Stock.StockPath
    A subtype implementing Path for simplified path-based joins.
    StockEnums
     
    StockEnums.PackageType
    The package type of the stock item.
    StockEnums.ProductType
    The source of the stock item.
    StockEnums.UnitType
    The unit used for the stock item.
    StockItem
    Java bean to hold the data for the Stock Availability Report
    StockRecord
    This class is generated by jOOQ.
